about: Run a design sprint to validate direction before building

---

## Context
What problem are we trying to solve?

## Sprint Questions
What must we learn to move forward?

## Target Moment
What specific user/system moment should we focus on?

## Track
- [ ] Design Creative (UX/product)
- [ ] Development Creative (architecture/feasibility)

## Depth
- [ ] Quick (30-45 min)
- [ ] Standard (2-4 hours)
- [ ] Deep (full day+)

## Success Criteria
What does validated look like?
